verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All night, all day, Angels watching over me, my Lord, All night, all day, Angels watching over me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I went down to the valley to pray, Angels watching over me, my Lord, My soul got happy and I stayed all day, Angels watching over me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When my heart is sad and blue, Angels watching over me, my Lord, I don't worry for anything, Angels watching over me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If you get there before I do, Angels watching over me, my Lord, Tell all my friends I'm coming too, Angels watching over me.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: If this world turns upside down, Angels watching over me, my Lord, I know he will see me through, Angels watching over me.
